'''Miramba''' was a [[Synthskin/Legends|synthskin]]-covered [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that infiltrated [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] former friend, [[Gru'um Ropple]]. She was transporting many [[frecker]]s inside her synthetic skin. When they were framed by [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and arrested, she set the little rodents loose, in a attempt of killing Jabba and his guards. The plan failed, since [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and some prisoners killed all freckers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
